title: ジャパンカップの後に・滾るこころ

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... It seems my summer training has borne
fruit.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But I must wear the proverbial helm firmly; I can't
let this victory go to my head.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Trainer, please...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Take me to the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Arrange it so that I may face her at the illustrious
Nakayama Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes. That's been my intention since I started on
this path.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
"Determination." I cannot turn my back on that
promise.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My reputation as the Beast's Successor has been
cemented, but now it's time I lay claim to the true
name!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: And... Oh?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: No, but I thought I heard...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Ah, El...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...? I wonder what's wrong.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Normally, El is more... in my face when she's
vexed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think back on how tenacious El Condor Pasa
appeared during summer camp.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It's gotta be me.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I have to be the one her eyes are following on the track—the one she glares at with such fire!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For Grass Wonder, everything is just a stepping
stone on the path to Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From El Condor Pasa's point of view, that must
be...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Now you're acting strange too. Is something the
matter?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is an extremely important time for Grass
Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After all the work she's been putting in, telling
her now might throw her off pace.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So, I keep my mouth shut.
